sentences.arabic: شَهِدَ الِاقْتِصَادُ العَالَمِيُّ نُمُوًّا مَلْحُوظًا فِي التِّجَارَةِ الدَّوْلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Svjetska ekonomija zabilježila je primjetan rast u međunarodnoj trgovini.
sentences.translationEn: The global economy has witnessed noticeable growth in international trade.

sentences.arabic: تُصَدِّرُ الدُّوَلُ الكَثِيرَ مِنَ المَوَادِّ الخَامِ وَالمُنْتَجَاتِ الصِّنَاعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Zemlje izvoze mnogo sirovina i industrijskih proizvoda.
sentences.translationEn: Countries export many raw materials and industrial products.

sentences.arabic: يَلْعَبُ التَّبَادُلُ التِّجَارِيُّ دَوْرًا هَامًّا فِي تَقْوِيَةِ العَلَاقَاتِ بَيْنَ الشُّعُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Trgovinska razmjena igra važnu ulogu u jačanju odnosa među narodima.
sentences.translationEn: Trade exchange plays an important role in strengthening relations between peoples.

sentences.arabic: تُحَاوِلُ الحُكُومَاتُ فَتْحَ أَسْوَاقٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِزِيَادَةِ الدَّخْلِ الوَطَنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Vlade pokušavaju otvoriti nova tržišta kako bi povećale nacionalni dohodak.
sentences.translationEn: Governments are trying to open new markets to increase national income.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ هَذَا النَّشَاطُ فِي خَلْقِ فُرَصِ عَمَلٍ لِلشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Ova aktivnost pomaže u stvaranju prilika za posao mladima.
sentences.translationEn: This activity helps in creating job opportunities for young people.
